title: (Bee's) Fluffy Carpets and Wool
description: My take on prettier, fluffier carpets and wool blocks
body: ### About 🐑 This pack changes the carpet and wool block models to look _a lot_ fluffier! It also improves wool textures by reducing the colour palette from around 40 colours to just 8. I hope you like it! <3 ### Compatibility Because of how Minecraft models work, compatibility with other resource packs and mods is mixed: * The fluffy carpet model should be compatible with all resource packs and mods * The wool model only works with vanilla blocks and ones from [Mortar (and Pastels)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mortar) You might get an in-game "made for a newer version of Minecraft" warning if you're not playing on the latest version. You can freely ignore it if you're playing on a version the resource pack file is tagged with. This pack does not require any mods to work. This pack might cause a performance impact on very low-power machines. ### Collections If you like this pack, you should also check out my other ones! They go really well together: - [My **Vanilla+ Collections**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections) ∗ a pack of extensive texture improvements, from grass to resources - [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) ∗ my take on prettier crop farming with new variable textures and models - [**Fine Armoury**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fine-armoury) ∗ many retextures of tools, weapons, and armour - [**Serified Font**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/serified-font) ∗ my take on a much fancier font - [**Cosier Beds**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cozier-beds) ∗ my take on prettier and cosier bed models (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Banner Pattern Clarity**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/banner-pattern-clarity) ∗ provides distinctive (and pretty) banner pattern item textures - [**Blockier Goat Horn**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockier-goat-horn) ∗ gives the goat horn a silly model in your hand I also make all kinds of data packs, like [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), the vanilla biome overhaul pack! You should visit my profile to see them all! You can also visit my [**website**](https://everloste.github.io/) to see everything I do, join my [**Discord community**](https://everloste.github.io/discord), or give me a small tip on [**Ko-fi**](https://everloste.github.io/ko-fi). Thank you and have fun! <3
